exploration_notes: This commit adds cuDNN runtime version exposure across 7 files in 4 layers: (1) Interface layer: CUDAHooksInterface.h adds virtual methods versionRuntimeCuDNN() and versionCuDNNFrontend(). (2) Implementation layer: CUDAHooks.h declares and CUDAHooks.cpp implements these methods - versionRuntimeCuDNN() calls cudnnGetVersion() for dynamic linking or falls back to CUDNN_VERSION for static, and versionCuDNNFrontend() returns CUDNN_FRONTEND_VERSION. (3) Context layer: Context.h exposes static wrapper
